description: Creates a visual representation of bags containing balls for probability drawing experiments. Requires balls() to populate bags.
utility: Create bags for ball drawing experiments

examples.expression:
B = bags(at(4,4), view(10,12), "Urn")
balls(B, "Urn", "red", 3, c(red))
balls(B, "Urn", "blue", 5, c(blue))
